text.title: Solo Kpi Dashboard Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Solo Kpi Dashboard Template.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS dashboard: signups 47/wk (▲12%), activation 38% (flat), paid conv 4.1% (▼0.5pp), churn 6.2% (▲), MRR $1240. Sunday signal: churn ▲ → WIP-1 = churn-survey wedge.
